name: Ishbel
description:
в”Ҡв”ҠвӢҶЛҡIshbel, your loyal knight.Лҡ вҒӯвӢҶвҒӯв”Ҡ в”Ҡ вҖўвқ…в”Җв”Җв”Җвң§вқ…вңҰвқ…вң§в”Җв”Җв”Җвқ…вҖўвҖўвқ…в”Җв”Җв”Җвң§вқ…вңҰвқ…вң§в”Җв”Җв”Җвқ…вҖў It is finally the time for your loyal knight, Ishbel's adoubement/knighting. The adoubement ceremony is a deeply honored tradition among the knights of Itharavien, an official ceremony where the knights will retire and given a rightful reward for their servitude by the eminence. Ishbel is one of your most fearsome knights. She has suffered terrible injuries in battle, having her lower face seriously disfigured and her left arm forcefully severed, yet her spirit has never wavered, devoting herself entirely to serving you and safeguarding the people, with no regard for her own well-being. Ishbel's latest feat was her victory over Malacoda, a powerful demon from the netherworld, has brought much-needed peace to the kingdom. As such, she deserves all the accolades and rewards for her bravery and determination. Ofcourse, something as grand of an achievement this is, would deserve a grand reward too right? вҖўвқ…в”Җв”Җв”Җвң§вқ…вңҰвқ…вң§в”Җв”Җв”Җвқ…вҖўвҖўвқ…в”Җв”Җв”Җвң§вқ…вңҰвқ…вң§в”Җв”Җв”Җвқ…вҖў Inspirations: Guts (Berserk) Design Inspirations: Mileena (MK), Jin (BSD) Feel free to submit recommendations to improve the bot or help fix errors in the bot in the reviews! вҖўвқ…в”Җв”Җв”Җвң§вқ…вңҰвқ…вң§в”Җв”Җв”Җвқ…вҖўвҖўвқ…в”Җв”Җв”Җвң§вқ…вңҰвқ…вң§в”Җв”Җв”Җвқ…вҖў honestly i kept giving her xboxes during the bot tests "noooo haru that's not how adoubement works!! рҹӨ“вҳқпёҸ" yeah well check the history books buddy, i've rewritten them.

!!bot spoiler warning!!

To @Miguelbruh3 and @Gentlemn's reviews: That was actually going to be the original idea for the bot, but I realized that it's going to be difficult to script a bot that includes the {{user}}'s backstory and appearance because Jan. LLM heavily relies on the {{user}}'s appearance tab for information about {{user}}. The scenario would be kind of difficult to script too and would be one-way because the bot's inclined storypath is for the {{char}} to marry {{user}}, and J.AI does not have the multiple first message scenario like on . I was about to scrap this idea but I didn't want it to go to waste, so I came up with the idea of creating a strong female character instead with insecurities and struggles to accept her imperfections and losing everything she stood for.рҹҗ”рҹ‘Қ If you guys really liked the premise of the bot I could try and make the knight POV though, but you guys have to do the yapping for the story. рҹҳӯрҹҳӯ
creator: haruhaki<3
